channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Texas Guard deputized with immigration and arrest authority: Sources
item.description: This comes after NewsNation witnessed the Texas guard babysitting a woman because they had no power to do anything else.
item.dc:creator: Ali Bradley, NewsNation

item.title: EU warns Trump it would ‘respond firmly’ to tariffs
item.description: “The EU would respond firmly to any trading partner that unfairly or arbitrarily imposes tariffs on EU goods,” a spokesperson said. “There is a lot at stake.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KREX 5

item.title: Passengers, crew killed in 'high-impact' air ambulance crash in Philadelphia identified
item.description: Authorities said a seventh person, who had been in a car at the time of the crash, has died. Their identity has not yet been released.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KRON4

item.title: Families visit DC crash site days after the deadliest US air disaster in a generation
item.description: Dozens of people walked along the banks of the Potomac River near Reagan National Airport, close to where an American Airlines jet and an Army Black Hawk helicopter collided Wednesday, killing all 67 aboard.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Michigan priest has license revoked after imitating Musk's gesture at Pro-Life Summit
item.description: The priest, Calvin Robinson, attended the National Pro-Life Summit in Washington, D.C. last month. Toward the end of his remarks at the Jan. 25 event, he mimicked Musk’s salute, which made the rounds online.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, ABC 4

item.title: Trump signs tariffs on Canada, Mexico and China
item.description: "Tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China are SIGNED!" White House spokesperson Harrison Fields posted on the social media platform X.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, ABC 4

item.title: Seven dead, 19 injured in 'high-impact' air ambulance crash in Philadelphia
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A person in a car was the seventh fatal victim of the fiery crash of an air ambulance onto a busy Philadelphia street, authorities said Saturday, as investigators sifted through burned cars, damaged homes and charred debris for clues to determine why the aircraft plummeted shortl
item.dc:creator: MATT ROURKE and MARC LEVY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Costco, Teamsters reach tentative contract agreement, avoiding a strike
item.description: Costco and the Teamsters union have reached a tentative agreement on a new contract, avoiding a strike, the union said Saturday. Teamsters spokesman Matthew McQuaid confirmed the agreement, which will have to be approved by members. Details of the agreement weren't immediately available.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump says he ordered airstrikes on ISIS leaders in Somalia
item.description: President Donald Trump said on Saturday that he ordered military airstrikes in Somalia taking out a senior ISIS attack planner and other terrorists he recruited.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ken Martin elected next DNC chair
item.description: Minnesota state party chair Ken Martin was elected on Saturday as the next leader of the Democratic National Committee (DNC) after securing a majority of the 448 DNC committee members’ votes.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: ICE crackdown sees 7,400 illegal migrants arrested in 9 days
item.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has arrested more than 7,400 people in nine days across several states amid its aggressive crackdown on illegal immigration since the new Trump administration came into office.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Philadelphia mayor confirms 7 dead, including one on the ground, in medical transport jet crash
item.description: Six people on board a medical transport jet that crashed in Philadelphia were killed. That is according to Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Why Trump's meme coin is a cash grab
item.description: The coin – officially called $Trump – briefly ascended into the top 15 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization and attracted over a half-million buyers.
item.dc:creator: Maximilian Brichta Doctoral Student of Communication, University of Southern California, ABC 4

item.title: Squatter exploits California laws targeting Malibu homeowners for decades
item.description: A Malibu real estate agent shared advice on how to avoid becoming a victim of squatter takeovers after a woman allegedly targeted California homeowners.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A deadly flight out of Wichita has one of America's most historic aviation cities reeling
item.description: A deadly collision between a passenger airliner and an Army helicopter left Kansas’ largest city grieving.
item.dc:creator: John Hanna And Heather Hollingsworth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: An air ambulance has crashed in Philadelphia. What to know about air medical transport
item.description: A medical transport jet carrying a child patient, her mother and four others slammed into a Philadelphia neighborhood and exploded in flames.
item.dc:creator: AUDREY McAVOY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A medical plane carrying a child patient and 5 others crashes in Philadelphia, setting homes ablaze
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A medical transport jet with a child patient, her mother and four others aboard crashed into a Philadelphia neighborhood shortly after takeoff Friday evening, exploding in a fireball that engulfed several homes.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and MATT ROURKE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Senate Democrats call for reinstatement of IGs fired by Trump
item.description: The lawmakers said that Congress did not receive the 30-day notice or the reason for the IG’s removals which took place at over a dozen agencies.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Medical plane carrying pediatric patient crashes in Philadelphia, sets homes ablaze
item.description: A medical transport jet headed for Missouri and carrying two people and four crew members crashed in Northeast Philadelphia Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KRON4

item.title: Trump refuses to say if he’s spoken to Putin; White House ‘talking’ about ending Ukraine war
item.description: President Trump on Friday wouldn’t say if he has spoken with Russian President Vladimir Putin since he began his second term but said there are ongoing discussions about ending the war in Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WGN 9

item.title: US colleges returning to campus sexual assault rules created during Trump's first term
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Schools and universities responding to complaints of sexual misconduct must return to policies created during President Donald Trump's first term, with requirements for live hearings and more protections for accused students, according to new guidance issued Friday by the Education
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Illinois governor blocks pardoned Jan. 6 rioters from state jobs
item.description: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker (D) said he would block pardoned Capitol insurrectionists from serving in local government positions, citing a state law ordinance, according to a Thursday letter obtained by The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: North Carolina's ex-lieutenant governor dismisses lawsuit against CNN, has no plans to run again
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — North Carolina's former Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson on Friday withdrew his defamation lawsuit against CNN that challenged a report about him making explicit posts on a pornography website’s message board over a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: GARY D. ROBERTSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Numerous goods could get more expensive due to Trump tariffs, experts say
item.description: The 25% tax that President Donald Trump plans to slap on imports from Canada and Mexico as soon as Saturday could drive up the price of everything from gasoline and pickup trucks, to Super Bowl party guacamole dip.
item.dc:creator: PAUL WISEMAN AP Economics Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 40+ bodies pulled from Potomac near Reagan National
item.description: More than 40 bodies have been recovered from the Potomac River after a deadly mid-air collision sent an Army Black Hawk helicopter and American Airlines plane diving into the icy water earlier this week, according to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WGN 9

item.title: 2 arrested in Texas after kidnapping ‘TikTok prank’ near school
item.description: “The children immediately contacted their parents, who notified the Kyle Police Department,” KPD said.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Russ, NewsNation

item.title: Flight recorders recovered in DCA crash
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) said Thursday that they recovered flight data recorders, known as black boxes, from the aircraft involved in the deadly mid-air collision near Reagan Washington National Airport earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, WGN 9

item.title: Trump says helicopter in crash was flying too high
item.description: President Donald Trump on Friday asserted the military helicopter involved in a deadly midair collision near Washington, D.C., was "flying too high.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Trump aid freeze disrupts global HIV/AIDS fight
item.description: A legacy bipartisan initiative to combat HIV and AIDS in Africa is collateral damage from President Donald Trump’s directive to halt all U.S. foreign assistance, despite efforts to exempt humanitarian assistance and lifesaving medication from being caught up in the three-month funding freeze.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, WGN 9

item.title: Congress authorized more flights at Reagan National despite warnings
item.description: Congress added more flights to Reagan National's schedule last year despite warnings from the airport.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, WFLA, NBC

item.title: DC plane crash: Recovery continues, NTSB says investigation ongoing
item.description: Air crash investigations can take months, and federal investigators told reporters they would not speculate on the cause.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Figure skaters among those on flight that collided with Army helicopter
item.description: U.S. Figure Skating released a statement saying athletes, coaches, and family members were on their way home from the National Development Camp held in conjunction with the U.S. Figure Skating Championship in Kansas when the collision happened.
item.dc:creator: Brian Farrell, ABC 4
